name: Castrick Clues
description: SaaS OSINT search tool that enumerates account existence across many platforms (Google, Flickr, Gravatar, Github, Facebook, etc.) from an email, username, or phone number.
bestFor: Pivoting from a single email, username, or phone number to discover which online platforms a person has accounts on (account/profile enumeration).
trustNote: Commercial SaaS platform with a 'no-trace / no-log' privacy claim that cannot be independently verified. Site posted a closure notice stating the service would shut down on 2026-02-07, so it may now be defunct (today is 2026-06-13). Verify availability before relying on it.
notes: Single hosted search tool, not a directory of tools. Free Basic tier (unlimited credits) covers a small module set (Google, Flickr, Gravatar) plus API access and no captcha; the paid Recon tier ($12, 30 credits) adds ~20 more platform modules including Notion, Trello, Github, Fitbit, Chess.com, Foursquare, Runtastic, Poshmark, Garmin, Goodreads, Yelp, Dropbox, Duolingo, Facebook, Microsoft, Quora, and Adobe. The underlying technique is account-existence checking across consumer platforms (similar to Holehe / WhatsMyName / Maigret). Registration/sign-in required. IMPORTANT: the site announced a shutdown for 2026-02-07 and credits being refunded by email, so the live service may no longer be reachable.
